title: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path_text: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
summary:
Main
Another active week on the tanker front, with a steady flow of transactions and ongoing negotiationstaking place across all vessel segments. On the dry side, interest remains high with several new sales emerging as market sentiment strengthens. Dry Cargo
On the Kamsarmax front, the MIAO XIANG (ABT 81K DWT, 2013, JIANGSU EASTERN) has been sold at USD 16.8 m, while on the Panamax segment, the KT BIRDIE (ABT 74K DWT, 2011, SASEBO HI) changed hands at USD 16.5 m to Greek interests.
